name: E-Shram
description: National Database of Unorganized Workers for targeted delivery of welfare schemes

additional_rules: Should not be an EPFO/ESIC member
Should not be an income tax payer

benefit_description: Accidental insurance cover of ₹2 Lakhs under PMSBY and targeted welfare delivery

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Are you a member of EPFO (Provident Fund) or ESIC?
